title.ko: 도어, 창 또는 윙용 힌지(Hinge) 및 지지 장치(피봇 일반 F16C 11/00)
title.en: HINGES OR SUSPENSION DEVICES FOR DOORS, WINDOWS OR WINGS (pivotal connections in general F16C0011000000)

definition.ko: 돌쩌귀 일반적구조 E05D1/00, E05D3/00 특수한 구조 E05D7/00 세부; 부속품 E05D5/00, E05D9/00; 11/00 윙용의 다른 지지장치(支持裝置) E05D13/00; 15/00

title.en: Pinless hinges; Substitutes for hinges
made of one piece
with guide members shaped as circular arcs
consisting of two easily-separable parts

title.ko: 핀이 붙은 힌지
title.en: Hinges with pins
with one pin
engaging three or more parts, e.g. sleeves, movable relatively to one another for connecting two or more wings to another member

title.ko: 두개 또는 그 이상의 핀을 갖는 것(E05D 7/08이 우선)
title.en: with two or more pins (E05D0007080000 takes precedence)
for swing-doors, i.e. openable by pushing from either side
with non-parallel pins

title.ko: 한개의 암과 두개의 평행한 핀을 갖는 것(E05D 3/08이 우선)
title.en: with two parallel pins and one arm (E05D0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 두개의 암과 네개의 평행한 핀을 갖는 것(E05D 3/08이 우선)
title.en: with four parallel pins and two arms (E05D0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 네개의 암과 일곱개의 평행한 핀을 갖는 것(E05D 3/08이 우선)
title.en: with seven parallel pins and four arms (E05D0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 슬라이딩 핀 또는 가이드(E05D 3/08이 우선)
title.en: with sliding pins or guides (E05D0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 단일(單一) 부품의 구조, 예. 부착용의 부품
title.en: Construction of single parts, e.g. the parts for attachment
Parts for attachment, e.g. flaps
Flat flaps
Bent flaps
of cylindrical shape

title.ko: 핀, 소켓 또는 슬리이브; 벗길 수 있는 핀(E05D 15/522가 우선)
title.en: Pins, sockets or sleeves; Removable pins (E05D0015522000 takes precedence)
Securing pins in sockets, movably or not
Construction of sockets or sleeves
to be secured without special attachment parts on the socket or sleeve

title.ko: 특수 구조의 힌지 또는 피봇(특수 현수(懸垂) 장치에 쓰여지는 것 E05D 15/00; 자동 폐쇄(閉鎖)하기 위한 것 E05F 1/06, 1/12; 회전하기 전에 윙을 들어올리는 수단을 갖는 것 E05F 7/02)
title.en: Hinges or pivots of special construction (used for special suspension arrangements E05D0015000000;so as to be self-closing E05F0001060000, E05F0001120000;with means for raising wings before being turned E05F0007020000)
for use on the right-hand as well as on the left-hand side; Convertible right-hand or left-hand hinges
Hinges adjustable relative to the wing or the frame
to allow tilting of the members

title.ko: 윙의 반대연(反對緣), 특히 정부(頂部)와 저부 (低部)에 배치되는 두개의 피봇으로 지지(支持)되는 것, 예. 트라니온(trunnion)
title.en: for use in suspensions comprising two spigots placed at opposite edges of the wing, especially at the top and the bottom, e.g. trunnions

title.ko: 윙의 한끝 가장자리에서 어떤 거리의 곳에 위치하는 윙 피봇축 (그를 위한 제동 장치 E05D11/08)
title.en: the pivot axis of the wing being situated near one edge of the wing (braking devices therefor E05D0011080000)

title.ko: 윙의 끝 가장자리에서 어떤 거리의 곳에 위치하는 윙 피봇
title.en: the pivot axis of the wing being situated at a considerable distance from the edges of the wing
with a fixed pivot axis
with a movable pivot axis
with two or more pivot axes, e.g. used at the same time

title.ko: 힌지와 기계적으로 조합된 제동 장치(창용(窓用) 제동 장치 그 자체 E05F 5/00)
title.en: Braking devices structurally combined with hinges (braking devices for windows per se E05F0005000000)

title.ko: 힌지축에서 부품을 간단히 분리할 수 있는 것 (힌지의 대용물 E05D1/06)
title.en: to allow easy separation of the parts at the hinge axis (substitutes for hinges E05D0001060000)
to allow easy detachment of the hinge from the wing or the frame
Hinges for safes
Flaps or sleeves specially designed for making from particular material, e.g. hoop-iron, sheet metal, plastics

title.ko: 경첩의 부가적(附加的) 특징 또는 부속품
title.en: Additional features or accessories of hinges
Lubricating arrangements

title.ko: 베어링 표면을 볼로서 사용하는 것(E05D 7/06이 우선)
title.en: relating to the use of free balls as bearing-surfaces (E05D0007060000 takes precedence)
Devices for limiting the opening movement of hinges

title.ko: 상대적으로 움직일 수 있는 힌지 부품용(部品用) 간의 마찰 장치(E05D 7/086이 우선)
title.en: Friction devices between relatively-movable hinge parts (E05D0007086000 takes precedence)
Devices for preventing movement between relatively-movable hinge parts

title.ko: 미닫이 또는 오르내리 윙에 사용되는 부속품, 예. 풀리, 안전 캐치(평형 장치 E05F 1/00, 3/00)
title.en: Accessories for sliding or lifting wings, e.g. pulleys, safety catches (counterbalance devices E05F0001000000, E05F0003000000)

title.ko: 윙용의 지지(支持) 장치(지지(支持)수단의 구조에 특징이 없는 윙 장치 E06B 3/32)
title.en: Suspension arrangements for wings (arrangements of wings not characterised by the construction of the supporting means E06B0003320000)
for revolving wings
with arms fixed on the wing pivoting about an axis outside of the wing
for wings sliding horizontally more or less in their own plane
consisting of two or more independent parts movable each in its own guides
movable out of one plane into a second parallel plane
consisting of parts connected at their edges
with movable arms situated in the plane of the wing
for wings sliding vertically more or less in their own plane
consisting of two or more independent parts movable each in its own guides
movable out of one plane into a second parallel plane
allowing an additional movement
consisting of parts connected at their edges
for folding wings
supported on arms movable in horizontal plane
with pivoted arms and sliding guides
with two pairs of pivoted arms
with wings opening parallel to themselves
moving along slide-ways so arranged that one guide member of the wing moves in a direction substantially perpendicular to the movement of another guide member
for upwardly-moving wings, e.g. up-and-over doors
supported on arms movable in vertical planes
with pivoted arms and horizontally-sliding guides
with pivoted arms and vertically-sliding guides
with two pairs of pivoted arms

title.ko: 운동을 선택적으로 행(行)할 수 있는 것(수직으로 활동하는 윙용(用) E05D 15/22)
title.en: allowing alternative movements (for vertically-sliding wings E05D0015220000)
for opening at either of two opposite edges
for opening about a vertical as well as a horizontal axis
with disconnecting means for the appropriate pivoting parts
using movable rods
Actuating mechanisms
Safety devices
for opening both inwards and outwards
with successive different movements
with both swinging and sliding movements
